case_title: THE MCKINLEY BUILDING LLC VS. SAM FLORES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE: #55.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE MCKINLEY BUILDING LLC
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE MCKINLEY BUILDING LLC
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE MCKINLEY BUILDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE MCKINLEY BUILDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORES, SAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1060 PINE STREET, #1, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SERVE THE NAMED DEFENDANT AND UNAMED OCCUPANT BY POSTING AND CERTIFIED MAIL CCP 415.45
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF THE MCKINLEY BUILDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, SAM
